ddls:
CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the post */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date when the post was made */,
  "post_content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the platform where the post was made */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the post has received */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of times the post has been shared */,
  "comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the post */,
  "post_type" TEXT /* Type of post (e.g., text, image, video, link) */,
  "post_url" TEXT /* URL of the post, if applicable */,
  "post_tags" TEXT /* Relevant tags or keywords associated with the post */,
  "is_sponsored" INTEGER /* Indicates if the post is sponsored or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES platforms ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the platform where the user is active */,
  "user_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the user */,
  "user_location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "user_language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the user */,
  "user_timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the social media platform */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the platform */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of platform (e.g., Twitter, Facebook, Instagram) */,
  "platform_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the platform */,
  "platform_category" TEXT /* Category of the platform (e.g., social media, blog, forum) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement record */,
  "post_id" TEXT /* ID of the post */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes */,
  "share_count" INTEGER /* Number of shares */,
  "comment_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., like, comment, share) */,
  "engagement_date" TEXT /* Date of engagement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "post_id" TEXT /* ID of the post the comment is on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_content" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "comment_parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment, if applicable */,
  "comment_thread" INTEGER /* Comment thread ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like */,
  "post_id" TEXT /* ID of the post that was liked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who liked the post */,
  "like_date" TEXT /* Date when the like was made */,
  "like_type" TEXT /* Type of like (e.g., regular like, love, wow) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each share */,
  "post_id" TEXT /* ID of the post that was shared */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who shared the post */,
  "share_date" TEXT /* Date when the share was made */,
  "share_platform" TEXT /* Platform where the post was shared */,
  "share_url" TEXT /* URL of the shared post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shares_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shares_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "trend_name" TEXT /* Name of the trending topic or hashtag */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trend */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trend */,
  "popularity_score" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the trend */,
  "trend_category" TEXT /* Category of the trend (e.g., hashtag, topic) */,
  "trend_popularity_history" TEXT /* Popularity score history of the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis result */,
  "post_id" TEXT /* ID of the post that was analyzed */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the post (positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "sentiment_type" TEXT /* Type of sentiment (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "sentiment_analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for sentiment analysis */,
  "sentiment_confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the sentiment analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "post_id" TEXT /* ID of the post that was predicted */,
  "viral_score" REAL /* Viral score of the post */,
  "predicted_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "prediction_model" TEXT /* Model used for prediction */,
  "prediction_confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scheduling" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scheduled post */,
  "post_id" TEXT /* ID of the post that is scheduled */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who scheduled the post */,
  "scheduled_date" TEXT /* Date when the post is scheduled */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the platform where the post is scheduled */,
  "schedule_status" TEXT /* Status of the scheduled post (e.g., pending, published, failed) */,
  "schedule_error_message" TEXT /* Error message, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scheduling_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scheduling_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES platforms ("platform_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scheduling_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the report is for */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "performance_score" REAL /* Performance score of the user */,
  "industry_benchmark" REAL /* Industry benchmark score */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., new comment, new like) */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was sent */,
  "alert_content" TEXT /* Content of the alert */,
  "alert_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the alert (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "alert_read_status" INTEGER /* Read status of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
